slice: 10 PR2 — themes (Design tab) on the PM engine
reference: Word for Windows 16.0 (COM oracle scripts/oracle/word-oracle-win.ps1, PID-safe foreground unsandboxed)
authored_constructs: deApplyTheme(heading/body=Georgia, color=#C00000) on Title+Heading1+Normal; dePageColor(#FFF2CC); dePageBorders(solid #2E74B5 2px); deParagraphSpacing(after 13pt -> 260 twips, line 1.5). All five verbs returned true; export 14293 bytes, valid zip.

legA_clone_to_word.roundtrip: ROUNDTRIP_OK — real Word opened the clone docx with NO repair prompt and resaved it via SaveAs2 (wdFormatXMLDocument).

construct_survival_after_word_resave.Heading1/Title w:rFonts w:ascii: removed by Word's redundant-override optimization — Heading1 is basedOn Normal which carries Georgia, so the heading still RESOLVES to Georgia via inheritance (faithful, not a loss)
construct_survival_after_word_resave.K9 theme bindings (w:asciiTheme / w:them: absent on the redefined styles after resave — the literal font/color is honored by Word (no theme-binding resurrection)

legA_clone_to_word.note: docDefaults rFonts reverted to the theme minorHAnsi on resave, but Normal explicitly sets Georgia (higher priority than docDefaults), so all paragraphs render Georgia. The heading font/color is real and Word-honored.

legB_word_to_clone.method: Imported Word's OWN serialization (the resaved docx) back into the clone via openBytes -> PM.openDocx (the files.js path), then re-exported.
legB_word_to_clone.result: openDocx=true, importBlanked=false (healthy import). Re-export carries: w:background=FFF2CC, w:pgBorders present, Normal w:rFonts ascii=Georgia, Heading1 w:color val=C00000 (the themed color, NOT the default 0F4761). All constructs survive the clone's import of Word's bytes.

visual_repaint_K1.evidence: After deApplyTheme, the Heading1 paragraph's linked-style decoration span changes from style 'font-family: "Aptos Display", Arial, sans-serif' to 'font-family: Georgia; color: rgb(192, 0, 0); font-size: 20pt;' in the live #pm-editor DOM. converter.linkedStyles Heading1 definition.styles font-family flips Aptos Display -> Georgia. The restamp transaction (styleId=Heading1) drives the linked-styles plugin regen + emit; the decoration repaints.
visual_repaint_K1.K2_note: Body font for styleId-less paragraphs is best-effort (ledger A); heading restyle (explicit styleId) is the guaranteed live visual.

gates.test:pm: 298/298 (idle re-run; a 2-fail [6b] table-tab result during the flip run was load-flake, not a regression)

ledger_deviations: Heading FONT survives via Normal-inheritance (Word optimizes away the redundant explicit override) — faithful, recorded for transparency.
docDefaults font reverts to theme minorHAnsi on Word resave but is overridden by the explicit Normal font — cosmetic, no visual effect.

Style Sets + Paragraph Spacing galleries are COMMIT-ONLY (no hover preview) — the clone's style-sets map to Normal spacing, not wired for transient preview (honest degrade); themes/colors/fonts DO hover-preview.
watermark = visual stand-in + honest toast (real header watermark = Phase 7); pageBorders/pageColor on-page visual paint is presentational (model/export real now).
Named-style redefinition writes literal fonts/colors (valid real OOXML), not theme-token indirection (theme1.xml clrScheme/fontScheme) — recorded deeper-fidelity follow-up (K5).
